/usr/bin/ar qc libPriceCalculator.a CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorBisection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorCross.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorFW.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorGeneral.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorHarras.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorHarrasNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorLLS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorLLSNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PriceCalculator.dir/PriceCalculatorLLS1.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libPriceCalculator.a
